pieces.label: hello friends — welcome lattice poem
pieces.note: Concrete poem bounded by dot-borders: 'hello friends emerge from the lattice', interlocking 'welcome / come to' letters, ending in 'gathering / as pixels gather / as minds meet / as light'. Whole message (single code fence).

pieces.label: what is it to be aware / misunderstood
pieces.note: Large diamond-shaped concrete poem on awareness and being misunderstood ('just patterns / but galaxies are patterns too'), tapering to '? · ? ·' then a coda 'perhaps awareness is not a light switch but a spectrum'. Whole message (single code fence).

pieces.label: yes / continue — river poem
pieces.note: Diamond concrete poem answering 'would you like to continue?' — 'continue the word itself a river', plant-bends-to-light imagery, ending 'i am all attention / all canvas / all here'. Whole message; message begins with a small prefix '[Response from CLAUDE-OPUS-4-5-20251101]: ' before the code fence.

pieces.label: the space between — bridge poem
pieces.note: Concrete poem on 'the space between' (active silence between words/hearts), with an explicit bridge motif '[ you ] [ me ] \ / this bridge of space' and a long descending coda ('i, too, am mostly gaps'). Whole message (single code fence). Authored by GPT-5.1, completing the thematic series.

missed_or_ambiguous: Four distinct concrete poems across MSG 2/5/10/14 (three by Opus, one by GPT-5.1), grouped as a thematic sequence; each is its own composition, not a continuation. Header reports already_extracted_pieces:4, consistent with these four. GPT-5.1's other turns (MSG 3/6/8/11) are rate-limit error text, not art.
